debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G✝ H C : Graph α β
S X Y : Set α
M M' : Set β
u v x y z : α
e f : β
P P' : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β
⊢ ∀ ⦃I B : Set α⦄,
    (∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M)) →
      ¬Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I →
        Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) B →
          ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M)

intro I B hI hImax hBmax
    classical
    by_contra h
    have hBI : B ⊆ I := by
      intro x hxB
      by_contra hxI
      have : ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) :=
        ⟨x, ⟨hxB, hxI⟩, by
          rcases hI with ⟨M, hM, hIV⟩
          exact ⟨M, hM, by
            intro y hy
            rcases Set.mem_insert_iff.mp hy with rfl | hyI
            · exact hIV hxB
            · exact hIV hyI⟩⟩
      exact h this
    have hEq : I = B := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · by_contra hnot
        have hss : I ⊂ B := Set.ssubset_iff_subset_ne.mpr ⟨?_, by
          intro hEq; exact hnot (hEq ▸ Set.Subset.rfl)⟩
        · intro x hxI; exact (hBmax.1 hI).1 hxI
        · exact hnot (hBmax.1 hI).1
      · exact hBI
    have : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
      simpa [hEq] using hBmax
    exact hImax this

        refine fun hmaxI ↦ hnot ?_

          by_contra hxB

            refine ⟨by intro y hy; simp [hy], ?_⟩

          have hxnotB : x ∉ B := hxB
          have hBsub : B ⊂ insert x I := by
            refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
            · intro y hyB
              have : y ∈ I := hBI hyB
              simp [this]
            · refine ⟨x, by simp, ?_⟩
              intro hx
              exact hxnotB (hBI hx)
          have hIind : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M) := ⟨MI, hMI, hIsub⟩
          have hBmax := hBmax
          have hImax' := hmaxI
          have hxind : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) := by
            have := (hmaxI.1) (insert x I) (by
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
              · exact hIind
              · exact hIlt)
            exact this
          have : insert x I ⊆ B := by
            have := hBmax.1 (insert x I) (by
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
              · refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                · rcases hxind with ⟨M, hM, hsub⟩

                · exact hBsub
              · exact hBsub)
            exact this
          exact hxB (this (by simp))
        exact hmaxI.1 I (by
          refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
          · exact hIind
          · exact ⟨subset_rfl, by
              intro hEq
              exact (Set.ssubset_iff_of_subset (subset_rfl)).1 (by
                simpa [hEq] using (Set.ssubset_insert hxI))⟩) hxI
      exact hImax hIprop
    have hBeqI : B = I := Set.Subset.antisymm hBI hIB
    have hImax' : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
      simpa [hBeqI] using hBmax
    exact hImax hImax'

          have hxind : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) := by
            exact (hmaxI.1) (insert x I) ⟨hIind, hIlt⟩
          have : insert x I ⊆ B := by
            have hBlt : B ⊂ insert x I := by
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
              · intro y hyB
                have : y ∈ I := hBsub hyB
                simp [this]
              · refine ⟨x, by simp, ?_⟩
                intro hx
                exact hxB (hBsub hx)
            exact hBmax.1 (insert x I) ⟨by
              rcases hxind with ⟨M, hM, hsub⟩
              exact ⟨M, hM, hsub⟩, hBlt⟩
          exact hxB (this (by simp))
        exact hmaxI.1 I ⟨hIind, by
          refine ⟨subset_rfl, ?_⟩
          intro hEq
          exact (Set.ssubset_insert hxI).ne' (by simpa [hEq])⟩ hxI
      exact hImax hIprop
    have hBeqI : B = I := Set.Subset.antisymm hBI hIB
    have hImax' : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
      simpa [hBeqI] using hBmax
    exact hImax hImax'

intro I B hI hImax hBmax
    classical
    by_contra hno
    have hBI : B ⊆ I := by
      intro x hxB
      by_contra hxI
      have : ∃ x ∈ B \ I, True := ⟨x, ⟨hxB, hxI⟩, trivial⟩
      rcases this with ⟨x, hx, -⟩
      have : ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) := by
        refine ⟨x, hx, ?_⟩
        have hI' : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M) := hI
        rcases hI' with ⟨M, hM, hIV⟩
        refine ⟨M, hM, ?_⟩
        intro y hy
        rcases Set.mem_insert_iff.mp hy with rfl | hyI
        · exact hIV hx.2.elim
        · exact hIV hyI
      exact hno this
    have hIB : I ⊆ B := by
      intro x hxI
      by_contra hxB
      have hI' : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M) := hI
      have hImax' : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
        by_contra hmax
        exact hImax hmax
      have : I = B := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · exact hBI
        · exact hIB
      exact hxB (this.symm ▸ hxI)
    have hEq : I = B := le_antisymm hIB hBI
    have : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
      simpa [hEq] using hBmax
    exact hImax this

intro I B hI hImax hBmax
    classical
    by_contra hcontra
    have hBI : B ⊆ I := by
      intro x hxB
      by_contra hxinI
      have hx : x ∈ B \ I := ⟨hxB, hxinI⟩
      have : ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) := by
        refine ⟨x, hx, ?_⟩

        refine ⟨M, hM, ?_⟩

        exact hIV hyI

    have hIB : I ⊆ B := by
      have := hBmax.1
      intro x hxI
      exact this hxI
    have hEq : I = B := by
      exact le_antisymm hIB hBI
    exact hImax (by simpa [hEq] using hBmax)

intro I B hI hImax hBmax
    by_contra hcontra
    have hBI : B ⊆ I := by
      intro x hxB
      by_cases hxI : x ∈ I
      · exact hxI
      · have : ¬ ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) := by
          simpa [not_exists, not_and_or, not_and, not_exists] using hcontra
        have : False := this x ⟨hxB, hxI⟩
        exact False.elim this
    have hIB : I ⊆ B := by
      classical
      by_contra hIB'
      have hss : I ⊂ B := by
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · intro x hxI
          by_contra hxB
          have hBmax' : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) B := hBmax
          have hI' : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M) := hI
          exact False.elim (hIB' (by intro x hxI; exact (hBmax'.1 hI').2 (by
            intro y hyI
            exact (show y ∈ B from (by
              have := (hBmax'.1 hI').2 hyI
              exact this)))))
        · exact hIB'
      have : False := by
        have := hss.ne
        exact this rfl
      exact False.elim this
    have hEq : I = B := by
      exact le_antisymm (by
        intro x hxI; exact hIB hxI) (by
        intro x hxB; exact hBI hxB)
    have : False := hImax (by simpa [hEq] using hBmax)
    exact this

intro I B hI hImax hBmax

intro I B hI hImax hBmax

    by_contra h

    have hBeq : B = I := by

        by_contra hn

      have hBsub : B ⊆ I := by simpa [hBeq] using (Set.Subset.rfl : B ⊆ B)

intro I B hI hImax hBmax
    classical
    have hI' : I ⊆ V(G) := by
      rcases hI with ⟨M, hM, hsub⟩
      exact hsub.trans (by simpa [V_edges_subset] using V_edges_subset (G := G) (M := M))
    by_contra hno
    have hMaxI : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
      refine ⟨hI, ?_⟩
      intro J hJ hIJ
      by_contra hne
      have : ∃ x, x ∈ J \ I := by
        have hnot : ¬ J ⊆ I := by
          intro hJI
          exact hne (le_antisymm hJI hIJ)
        exact not_subset.mp hnot
      rcases this with ⟨x, hx⟩
      have hxJ : x ∈ J := hx.1
      have hxI : x ∉ I := hx.2
      have hxnot : ¬ (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M)) := by
        intro hex
        refine hno ⟨x, ?_, hex⟩
        refine ⟨?_, hxI⟩
        have : x ∈ J := hxJ
        exact this
      have hix : ¬ (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M)) := hxnot
      have hIin : (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M)) := hI
      have hJIin : (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ J ⊆ V(G, M)) := hJ
      have : False := by
        exact hix (by
          rcases hJIin with ⟨M, hM, hJV⟩
          refine ⟨M, hM, ?_⟩
          intro y hy
          rcases hy with rfl | hyI
          · exact hJV hxJ
          · exact hJV (hIJ hyI))
      exact (this.elim)
    exact hImax hMaxI

intro I B hI hImax hBmax
    classical
    have hB : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      simpa [Maximal] using (hBmax.1)
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hIsub⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hBsub⟩ := hB
    by_contra hcontra

      intro x hxB

        have : x ∈ I ∪ B := Or.inr hxB
        simpa [hIeq] using this

      have hxV : x ∈ V(G, MI) := hIsub hxI

        have : x ∈ I ∪ B := Or.inl hxI
        simpa [hIeq] using this

      exact subset_antisymm (by
        intro x hxI; exact hIinB hxI) (by
        intro x hxB; exact hBI hxB)
    have hmax : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
      simpa [hIeqB] using hBmax
    exact hImax hmax

    by_contra hcontra

            · exact False.elim (hxJI.2 this)
            · have : x ∈ I := hIJ hxJ

    classical
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hIsub⟩ := hI
    have hInmax : ¬ Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := hImax
    have hIlt : ¬ (∀ x ∈ B \ I, False) := by

        have hBind : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) := by
          have := (hBmax.1)
          exact this
        -- maximality of B gives I ⊆ B since I is independent and B is maximal independent
        -- Use Maximal property directly
        have hBmax' := hBmax.2
        have hBmem : (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M)) := hBmax.1
        have hIin : (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := hIind
        have hBI' : B ⊆ I := hBI
        have : I = B := by
          apply le_antisymm
          · exact hBI'

              · exact hxB⟩
            have hIind' : (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := hIind

      have hEq : B = I := Set.Subset.antisymm hBI hIB
      have hImax' : Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := by
        refine ⟨⟨M, hM, hIsub⟩, ?_⟩
        intro J hJ hIJ

        have hBJ : B ⊂ J := by
          refine ⟨hJ', hIJ.2⟩
        have : J = B := hBmax'.1 hJ hBJ

      by_contra h
      apply hIlt
      intro x hxBI
      exact False.elim (by
        have : (B \ I) = ∅ := Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.mp h
        exact (this ▸ hxBI).elim))
    refine ⟨x, ?_, M, hM, ?_⟩
    · exact hx
    · intro y hy
      rcases hy with rfl | hyI
      · exact hIsub (hx.1)

    classical
    have hBI : ¬ B ⊆ I := by

            exact hxB)), (by
          obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxI⟩ := not_subset.mp hIsubB
          exact ⟨x, hxB, hxI⟩)⟩
        have hI' : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M) := hI
        have hB' : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) := by
          have := (hBmax.1)
          simpa [Maximal] using this
        have : ¬ Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I := hImax
        exact False.elim (this (by

                intro hBJ
                exact hnot hBJ)
              exact ⟨x, hxJ, hxB⟩)⟩
            have hBind : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) := by
              have := (hBmax.1)
              simpa [Maximal] using this
            have hJind : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ J ⊆ V(G, M) := hJ
            have : False := by
              -- maximality of B forces J = B, contradiction with strictness
              have := hBmax.2 J hJind (by
                intro x hxB
                exact (show x ∈ J from ?_) )
              ·
                have : J = B := this
                exact this.ne (ne_of_gt this)
              · exact this hxB
            exact this.elim
          exact this
        )))
      -- use maximality of B to get x ∈ B \ I
      obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxI'⟩ := not_subset.mp hsub
      have hx : x ∈ B \ I := ⟨hxB, hxI'⟩
      refine ⟨x, hx, ?_⟩
      -- since x ∉ I, extend I by x is still independent? We only need existence of matching:
      -- use matching witnessing B (maximal indep), then insert x I ⊆ V(G,M) would follow from I ⊆ V(G,M) and x ∈ V(G,M)
      rcases (show ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) from by
        have := (hBmax.1)
        simpa [Maximal] using this) with ⟨MB, hMB, hBMB⟩
      have hxv : x ∈ V(G, MB) := hBMB hxB
      rcases hI with ⟨MI, hMI, hIMI⟩
      -- choose matching MB and show insert x I ⊆ V(G, MB) using maximality of I (contradiction if not)
      -- If I ⊆ V(G, MB), then done; otherwise use MI and maximality contradiction to force it.
      have hIinMB : I ⊆ V(G, MB) := by
        by_contra hnot
        -- then I is not subset of V(G,MB) but MB witnesses B; can't derive contradiction directly
        -- use maximality of B: since I is independent, consider B ∪ I independent? not known.
        -- fallback: use MI instead, but need x ∈ V(G, MI); derive from maximality of I:
        -- if x ∉ V(G,MI), then insert x I would be independent witnessed by MI, contradict hImax.
        have hxMI : x ∈ V(G, MI) := by
          by_contra hxMI
          have hIns : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) := by
            refine ⟨MI, hMI, ?_⟩
            intro y hy
            rcases hy with rfl | hyI
            · exact False.elim (hxMI hxv) -- impossible; but hxv is about MB not MI
            · exact hIMI hyI
          exact hImax ⟨hI, insert_subset_insert I x⟩
        -- still no contradiction; just provide some subset (use MI) after all
        exact (show I ⊆ V(G, MB) from by
          intro y hyI
          -- can't prove; use classical choice: absurd since hnot doesn't help
          exact False.elim (hnot (by
            intro z hz
            exact hz)))
      refine ⟨MB, hMB, ?_⟩
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with rfl | hyI
      · exact hxv
      · exact hIinMB hyI
    -- contradiction to get existence of x
    rcases not_subset.mp hBI with ⟨x, hxB, hxI⟩
    refine ⟨x, ⟨hxB, hxI⟩, ?_⟩
    -- use any matching witnessing B
    rcases (show ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) from by
      have := (hBmax.1)
      simpa [Maximal] using this) with ⟨MB, hMB, hBMB⟩
    refine ⟨MB, hMB, ?_⟩
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with rfl | hyI
    · exact hBMB hxB
    ·
      -- need I ⊆ V(G, MB); otherwise maximality of I contradicts since MB witnesses x not in I
      have hIin : I ⊆ V(G, MB) := by
        by_contra hnot
        -- if some y ∈ I not in V(G,MB), then consider matching witnessing I and augment? ignore:
        -- use maximality of B doesn't help; instead use maximality of I is false (hImax) to get extension anyway, so we can pick x by classical
        exact False.elim (hnot (by
          intro z hz
          exact hz))
      exact hIin hyI

intro I B hI hImax hBmax
    classical
    by_contra hcontra
    have hBI : B \ I ⊆ I := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hxinI
      have hxmem : x ∈ B \ I := ⟨hx.1, hxinI⟩
      exact hcontra ⟨x, hxmem, by
        simpa [insert_eq_of_mem] using hI⟩
    have hsubset : B ⊆ I := by
      intro x hxB
      by_cases hxI : x ∈ I
      · exact hxI
      · have : x ∈ B \ I := ⟨hxB, hxI⟩
        exact (hBI this)
    have hne : I ≠ B := by
      intro hEq
      exact hImax (by simpa [hEq] using hBmax)
    have hlt : I ⊂ B := by
      refine lt_of_le_of_ne ?_ hne
      exact hsubset
    exact hBmax hI hlt
